action_args_t(3) Library Functions Manual action_args_t(3)

NAME

action_args_t - Action argument structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/options/actions.h>

Data Fields


const char * output_path
Output path for generation actions (config, manpage, completions). const char * shell_name
Shell name for completion actions.

Detailed Description

Action argument structure.

Holds optional arguments for actions that need them (e.g., config path for --config-create)

Definition at line 31 of file actions.h.

Field Documentation

const char* action_args_t::output_path

Output path for generation actions (config, manpage, completions).

Definition at line 32 of file actions.h.

const char* action_args_t::shell_name

Shell name for completion actions.
